raw_consumer_statement: My wallet was stolen at the gym ( XXXX XXXX  ) on XX/XX/year>. All 7 credit cards and one debit card was charged ranging between {$200.00} and {$600.00}. One of the credit card is Barclays master card. I disputed the transaction that was made at XXXX and gave me a provisional credit but they came to conclusion that the transaction was valid therefore they charged the disputed transaction for {$250.00}. I do have a police report on file. It is frustrating that they came to this conclusion without doing their due diligence to protect their customers from fraud or thieves!
